name: Suspicious Data Transfer Detected
description: An unusually large data transfer has been detected, which could indicate potential data exfiltration from the network.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The date and time of the data transfer.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address of the transfer.

parameters.name: dest_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the transfer.

parameters.name: source_port
parameters.description: The source port of the connection.

parameters.name: dest_port
parameters.description: The destination port of the connection.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: The protocol of the transfer (e.g., TCP, UDP, HTTP, FTP).

parameters.name: bytes_transferred
parameters.description: The amount of bytes transferred in the connection.
